Video.summary: The team from Wired2Fish delivers the goods on how to catch the biggest fish—wherever or whenever you're casting lines.
Video.grandparentTitle: Wired2Fish | Baits and Gear For the Biggest Catch
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Fishing expert Jim Crowley teaches us how to design and build our own rigs for every freshwater species.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Dustin takes viewers to the top destinations for the biggest fish.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: The Stoked on Fishing crew takes you to the most amazing locations for some epic saltwater action.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: The Lindner team takes viewers to the best locations for the biggest fish.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Jim Crowley interviews top anglers and industry insiders from around the world of angling.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Angling legend Jimmy Houston takes us on his most successful trips with big fish and hilarious antics.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Jim explains how effective drop shotting can be for largemouth bass when the bass are keying in on bedding bluegills.
Video.grandparentTitle: Jim Crowley Outdoors | Jiggin' & Drop Shottin'
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Jim shows how effective the drop shot can be on Bass during the extreme heat of Summer.
Video.grandparentTitle: Jim Crowley Outdoors | When its Hot... Drop Shot!.mp4
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Paul and Ray return to a remote Northern Ontario lake for the final shoot of the season. Facing a tricky beaver dam crossing, they bring in Dan and Ben for extra hands and safety. The day delivers incredible walleye and bass action, capped off with a shore lunch featuring perfectly seasoned walleye courtesy of Outdoor Flavours.
Video.grandparentTitle: Remote Lakes, Big Fish, Epic Days
Video.title: FishON | Last Cast Walleye Pursuit

Video.summary: Fishing legend Hank Parker take viewers to the most secluded locations for the biggest fish.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Learn the best gear and strategies to target the biggest fish in the pre-spawn spring angling season.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Al Lindner and Jeff Klozinski spend the day tracking down postspawn smallmouth.
Video.grandparentTitle: Lindner's Angling Edge | Finding Transitional Smallmouth
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: The crew heads to Trinidad to fish for "Big Silver."
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Accompanied by his friend Mike Ebach, Kim probes the vegetated aggregation of cattail reed beds. Then later capitalizes on the knowledge learned with a new weedless hollow-bodied bait by Strike King—the Hack Attack Pad Perch.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Hank is headed to SC to spend a day with some of his favorites young pals at The Boy's Farm in Newberry. Hank & the boys target stripers on beautiful Lake Murray.
Video.grandparentTitle: Hank Parker Outdoors: Fishing for stripers on Lake Murray
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Kids with life-threatenting illnesses are in need of help & hope. Today Hank shares his boat with Outdoor Dream Foundation.
Video.grandparentTitle: Hank Parker Outdoors: Making dreams a reality
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Hank shares the water with some youth bass anglers. He teaches the anglers how to read and fish new water.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Hank Parker goes after the fish on Lake Monticello with friend Bobby Williams.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Hank Parker spends a day catching fish with well-known Christian author Dennis Rainey.
Video.grandparentTitle: Hank Parker Fishing - Grosse Savanne Bass Fishing
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Hank and close friend/business partner, Keith Kelly return to Hank's premiere signature lake.
Video.grandparentTitle: Hank Parker Outdoors: Big Bass at Rockhouse Farms
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Fom South Carolina to Texas, today's show covers 1,500 miles of bass fishing & baseball fun. Hank's grandson pitcher, Alec takes a break from sports camp to join "pawpaw."
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Hank sets out with two next-generation fishermen... high schoolers with a hunger for the outdoors. He shares his tricks of the trade as he & his young friends land some big bass using a variety baits.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Hank Parker spends a day on Lake Hartwell chasing after the fish and sharing his boat with Outdoor Dream Foundation friends.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Through her 36 years in the Army as a nurse and medic, Laura Ludwig faced many challenges. None more difficult than taking care of the young men and women who served in Iraq and Afghanistan. Since coming home Laura has not stopped serving.
Video.grandparentTitle: Operation Fishing Freedom - Army Nurse Laura Ludwig
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Season 8 Episode 3 kicks off our first open-water shoot of the year as Paul Ethier and Jeff Shippam make their way to the legendary Mattagami Lake for some classic spring walleye action. With competitive tournaments on pause this season, the guys revisit their favourite early-season hotspots—areas they’d normally fish under pressure—now with time to explore, adapt, and enjoy the day. From structure-hopping to dialing in the spring pattern, Paul and Jeff put their tournament instincts to work for a fun, relaxed day chasing hungry post-spawn walleye in Northern Ontario.
Video.grandparentTitle: Remote Lakes, Big Fish, Epic Days
Video.title: FishON | Spring Break on Mattagami Lake

Image.alt: FishON | Spring Break on Mattagami Lake
FishON | Spring Break on Mattagami Lake
FishON | Spring Break on Mattagami Lake

Video.summary: If you want to catch walleye after walleye including big fish too, plan a trip to Q Lake Lodge. Watch Jeremy Smith and Jeff Simpson catch fish from dawn until dusk, shallow and deep, using a variety of classic walleye presentation options.
Video.grandparentTitle: Lindner's Angling Edge | Q Lake Lodge Giant Walleye
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Lake X Largemouths
Video.grandparentTitle: One More Cast - Lake X Largemouths
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Florida's weedy Lake Okeechobee boasts topwater buzzbait bassin' at its best.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Stoked On Fishing jumps on board the Top Gun 80 out of San Diego, California, for Stan Vanderburg's annual five-day Rod & Reel Radio charter. We go offshore and have an absolute blast. We finish the trip in style in part three, catching some more bluefin tuna and giant yellowtail.
Video.grandparentTitle: Stoked on Fishing - Epic Five Day Fishing Charter on the Top One 80, Part Three
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Jarrett and Jared Lintner are punching plastics for bass on Clear Lake in California
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Hook n' Look returns to Carter's Lake with guide, Louie Bartenfield. He and host, Kim Stricker employ TG Finesse Football Jigs along steep banks and the endeavor pays off with some southern bling!
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: This week, we're on the road again, headed to the Mississippi to see our friend Adam Christianson to catch some perch! With the ice coming in slow this year it's time to hop on the airboat for a fun ride!
Video.title: Larry Smith Outdoors | Airboat Perch Fishing

Image.alt: Larry Smith Outdoors | Airboat Perch Fishing
Larry Smith Outdoors | Airboat Perch Fishing
Larry Smith Outdoors | Airboat Perch Fishing

Video.summary: Join us on an exhilarating journey deep into the heart of Northern Ontario as we tackle mid-summer walleye fishing like never before! Guided by the rising sun, we gear up with our Polaris Ranger to access a remote lake for a day filled with fishing action and good times. Joining the adventure is Mercury Canada Marketing Manager Cameron Racine, adding expertise and excitement to this unforgettable outing. Don't miss the fun, the fish, and the breathtaking scenery!
Video.grandparentTitle: FishON! | Northern Adventures: Mid-Summer Walleye Quest with Cameron Racine from Mercury Canada
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Florida Flippin'
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Redemption on Horwood Lake with our local friends. Chasing Walleye in Northern Ontario.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Bass fishing in late summer can be tough, watch as Dusing shows ways to overcome the tough conditions.
Video.grandparentTitle: Catching Bass | Late Summer Bass Smash
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Dustin uses cool new bait to help catch finicky bass
Video.grandparentTitle: Catching Bass | New Spin on Finesse
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Jim reviews how to build your own bladed jig rod.
Video.grandparentTitle: Angler's Workshop | Building a Bladed Jig Rod
Video.title: Episode 1
